sections.name: 💬 Channel Management
actions: Synchronize channel permissions with a category
Configure a voice channel to create temporary voice channels
Change the font of all channels on a server

sections.name: ⚜️ Role Management
actions: Add a role to all server members
Remove a role from all server members

sections.name: 🎙️ Voice
actions: Speak in voice channels (requires the bot's presence here)
Configure the voice channel to create temporary voice channels

sections.name: <a:warning2:1305656318740140124> WARNING <a:warning2:1305656318740140124>
actions: *This action is irreversible and cannot be undone, so it should be used with caution. It should only be used if the server is empty and has no roles or channels.*
Create a server (roles, channels and categories, with setup permissions on included channels)

sections.name: 🔄 Server Management
actions: Copy emojis and stickers from a server
Change the font of all channels on a server
Change the server style by renaming channels and categories with a preset

**REMINDER: An anti-raid is active on the server, no need to manage it (it deletes channels automatically created by the raid and will kick those responsible for the raid, it will also automatically delete messages created by the raid). It is also active for anti-nuke. These systems are automatic and require no intervention on your part.**

howTo.title: 📝 How to Use
howTo.description: To trigger an action, use keywords in your requests followed by "Glados" anywhere in the message:
examples: "Glados create a rules channel" to create a rules channel
"Glados add the role @role to @user" to add a role to a user
